descriptions.title: Cargo Clearance CLO airport
paragraphs: Includes our charges, our customs agent's charges and ICA´s fees.

descriptions.title: Import taxes in Colombia
paragraphs: Colombia taxes the import of pet animals. Total cost is approximately 35% over CIF value.

paragraphs: Home delivery to owner´s residence within city limits.

notes.title: Conditions of contract
paragraphs: a This price does not include cost of insurance of the animal.
b Prices charged by third parties may vary, in which case we will inform if there are
any variation in the customer´s charges.
c Payment: Wire transfer al least 10 days before arrival date.
